operations.search:
slug: info.id ?? info.slug ?? info.name,
          name: info.name ?? info.id ?? info.slug,
          isCustom: false,
          capabilities: (info.id ?? "").startsWith("gpt-")
            ? GPT_MODEL_CAPABILITIES
            : DEFAULT_COPILOT_MODEL_CAPABILITIES,
        }))
      : [...BUILT_IN_MODELS];
